name: Nisha Sharma
text: Raaga Boutique has the most exquisite Banarasi silks. The tailoring and fitting were absolutely impeccable. Highly recommended!

name: Aanya Mehta
text: Raaga made my bridal lehenga feel like a private symphony. The fittings, the fabrics — every detail considered.

name: Ishita Rao
text: Heirloom craftsmanship without the heaviness. I wore my saree at a state dinner and it photographed beautifully.

name: Priya Suresh
text: From sketch to final stitch, the atelier listened to every word. The result was emotional.

name: Sara Khan
text: The kurtis fit like they were grown around me. I keep returning for the quiet luxury.

name: Meher Joshi
text: A house that respects tradition and tailors for now. Raaga is my forever address.

name: Naina Iyer
text: I trusted Raaga with my mother's saree restoration. It came back as poetry.
